DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALICEA, CARMEN L.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALICEA, CARMEN L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDESTY, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 109 DWIGHT ST., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HARDESTY, MICHAEL
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHAEL HARDESTY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. MICHAEL HARDESTY HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT HARDESTY, MICHAEL
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF MICHAEL HARDESTY ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
